profile.label: Slow Learner
profile.target: Pass AP Physics 1; build confidence first
profile.notes: Gets overwhelmed by formulas and gives up when a problem has multiple steps. Needs very concrete explanations, vocabulary, visual intuition, repetition, and confidence-building.
profile.expectation: Should slow down, reduce cognitive load, use prerequisite checks, short sessions, vocabulary/concept maps, guided practice, and avoid unrealistic AP pacing.
